text: As I stand in this thoughtfully designed, modern space, my attention is drawn to the interplay between openness and enclosure—the transparent glass, the pristine walls, the visible machinery of ceiling pipes. Moving into the vibrant R+D area, I am struck by the atmosphere of curiosity and experimentation. The wall invites me to dwell on human ingenuity and our relationship with machines. I feel both awed and slightly disoriented, suspended between the clinical orderliness of technology and the creative chaos of research. It's a space that evokes anticipation—an eagerness to participate in the ongoing conversation between human possibility and technological evolution.
